case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. GILMA DIAZ REYES

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, GILMA DIAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT GILMA DIAZ REYES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED NOV-04-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, GILMA DIAZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYES, GILMA DIAZ $2,366.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,466.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, GILMA DIAZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/26/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
